hero.subtitle: Turn your clause libraries, templates, and house style into Agentic Attorney Skills. Extend your own todo.law stack, or contribute open skills to the LegalQuants community. Every skill works in both.
hero.login: Already have an account? Log in
social.title: Built for lawyers who build
value.label: Why Clausemaster
value.v1.title: Turn expertise into skills
value.v1.desc: Package your legal knowledge into reusable AI skills — structured clause patterns, boilerplate language, and metadata that power contract analysis at scale.
value.v2.title: Get more from your stack
value.v2.desc: Add your own clause libraries and templates to your self-hosted todo.law deployments. Give Dealroom your standards so it drafts the way you do. Your skills, your stack.
value.v3.title: Deploy anywhere
value.v3.desc: Your skills can run on TODO.LAW's cloud, on your own private infrastructure, or on air-gapped hardware with open-weight models for maximum confidentiality.
value.v4.title: Contribute to LegalQuants
value.v4.desc: Publish open skills to the LegalQuants (LQ.AI) community so your work runs across the ecosystem, from Dealroom for deal management to DPO Central for privacy compliance.
skills.label: Agentic Attorney Skills
skills.intro: An Agentic Attorney Skill is a structured legal template that AI agents use to assist clients in real time. When a startup needs an NDA or a company needs a GDPR assessment, the AI agent draws on your skill to guide the interaction — clause by clause, option by option.
skills.contract.title: Contract Skills
skills.contract.desc: Templates for negotiated agreements. Each clause comes with multiple options ranging from party-favorable to balanced, with plain-language explanations and production-ready legal text.
skills.contract.examples: NDAs · MSAs · SaaS Agreements · DPAs · Pilot Contracts · Term Sheets
skills.assessment.title: Assessment Skills
skills.assessment.desc: Structured compliance checklists and evaluation frameworks. Categories, criteria, risk levels, remediation guidance — everything an assessor needs in one place.
skills.assessment.examples: GDPR Assessments · DPIAs · AI Governance · Vendor Audits · Risk Assessments
skills.solo.title: Solo-Party Documents
skills.solo.desc: Policies and unilateral documents where there is no counterparty. Options represent different approaches — minimal, standard, or comprehensive.
skills.solo.examples: Privacy Policies · Terms of Service · Acceptable Use Policies · Codes of Conduct
workflow.label: How It Works
workflow.s1.title: Upload a contract
workflow.s1.desc: Upload any contract. The AI pipeline classifies the document, extracts clauses, and flags potential issues.
workflow.s2.title: Generate a legal skill
workflow.s2.desc: Turn the analysis into a structured knowledge artifact — clause patterns, boilerplate templates, and jurisdiction metadata.
workflow.s3.title: Review & refine
workflow.s3.desc: Use the skill editor to fine-tune clauses, boilerplate language, and metadata across dedicated tabs.
workflow.s4.title: Publish or install
workflow.s4.desc: Install the skill into your own todo.law stack, or publish it as an open contribution to the LegalQuants community.
workflow.s5.title: Run it everywhere
workflow.s5.desc: The same skill runs in both your self-hosted todo.law deployments and across the LegalQuants ecosystem. Dual-format by default.
feat.label: Core Capabilities
feat.analysis.title: AI Contract Analysis
feat.analysis.headline: From PDF to structured insights.
feat.analysis.desc: Upload any contract and the AI pipeline classifies the document, extracts every clause, identifies bias indicators, and flags issues — all in seconds.
feat.skill.title: Skill Generation
feat.skill.headline: Knowledge you can ship.
feat.skill.desc: After analysis, generate a legal skill — a structured artifact that captures clause patterns, boilerplate language, and contract metadata. Edit everything in a tabbed draft editor.
feat.marketplace.title: Dual-Format Skills
feat.marketplace.headline: Build once, run in both.
feat.marketplace.desc: Every skill Clausemaster builds is dual-format. Install it into your own self-hosted todo.law stack, or publish it as an open skill to the LegalQuants community.
feat.deploy.title: Multi-Platform Reach
feat.deploy.headline: Your skills, everywhere.
feat.deploy.desc: Published skills can be consumed on TODO.LAW's hosted cloud, deployed to your own private infrastructure, or run on portable air-gapped hardware with open-weight models.
cta.text: Turn your legal expertise into installable skills. Start building on Clausemaster today.
